title: T-029 — Server Action deleteFa (NPD-a) with confirmation + audit
prompt:
# T-029 — deleteFa Server Action

PRD: 01-NPD-PRD.md §2.2 (fa.delete), §2.3 (audit + confirmation)
Project root: /Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira
Prototype: design/Monopilot Design System/npd/modals.jsx:349-386 (fa_delete_modal)

## Goal
deleteFa(productCode, reason) Server Action requiring fa.delete permission, requires reason >=10 chars, soft-deletes via setting deleted_at column (migration adds it), emits fa.deleted event, writes audit_events row.

## Implementation contract
Migration 0020 adds product.deleted_at TIMESTAMPTZ + view fa filter where deleted_at IS NULL. Server Action checks RBAC, validates reason, sets deleted_at, emits fa.deleted, writes audit row {actor, productCode, reason}. Tests for happy path, reason length, RBAC.

## Files
- packages/db/migrations/0020_product_soft_delete.sql [create]
- apps/web/app/(npd)/fa/actions/delete-fa.ts [create]
- apps/web/app/(npd)/fa/actions/__tests__/delete-fa.test.ts [create]

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given user role npd_manager calls deleteFa(code,'invalid recipe per QA'), when run, then product.deleted_at is set and listFaByDept excludes the row
2. Given reason length 5, when deleteFa runs, then ValidationError thrown for reason min length
3. Given user role core_user calls deleteFa, when run, then AuthError thrown (no fa.delete)

## Test strategy
- RED: 3 tests covering soft-delete, reason length, RBAC denial
- Run 'pnpm --filter db migrate && pnpm --filter web test delete-fa'

## Risk red lines
- Do not hard-delete (audit retention required)
- Do not skip audit row
- Do not allow deletion without reason

pipeline_inputs.description: Soft-delete FA with reason and audit log; updates fa view to exclude deleted rows.
pipeline_inputs.details: Migration adds deleted_at column + updates fa view; action validates reason min length, RBAC, writes audit + outbox.
out_of_scope: Do not build fa-delete modal UI here (covered by separate UI task in NPD-i if needed)
acceptance_criteria: Given user role npd_manager calls deleteFa(code,'invalid recipe per QA'), when run, then product.deleted_at is set and listFaByDept excludes the row
Given reason length 5, when deleteFa runs, then ValidationError thrown for reason min length
Given user role core_user calls deleteFa, when run, then AuthError thrown
test_strategy: RED: 3 tests for soft-delete, reason length, RBAC denial before action exists
Run 'pnpm --filter db migrate && pnpm --filter web test delete-fa'
risk_red_lines: Do not allow deletion without reason
